channel.title: Liberty Moves Orlando Blog
channel.description: Latest posts from Liberty Moves Orlando

item.title: Revive OS Publish Test — 2026-04-20 23:13 UTC
item.author: Revive Agency
item.content:encoded:
# Revive OS Publish Test — 2026-04-20 23:13 UTC
This post was created through Revive OS end-to-end — Blog Manager UI → publish-blog-to-site edge function → GitHub commit → Vercel deploy.
## What this proves
- Employees can write and ship blog posts directly through Revive OS - The publish pipeline honors `clients.github_repo` so any connected repo works - Vercel auto-deploys new blog posts within seconds
## The test
If you are reading this on reviveagency.io, the full pipeline is verified live.
— Posted automatically by E2E test
